moduleTitle: Identification, assessment, and management of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities
questionText: Does your organization have a process for identifying, assessing, and managing environmental dependencies and/or impacts related to your portfolio activities?
questionKo: 귀사는 포트폴리오 활동과 관련된 환경 의존성 및 / 또는 영향을 식별, 평가 및 관리하는 프로세스를 갖추고 있습니까?
issueTags: Water, Biodiversity, Plastics, Climate Change, Forests
simpleHelp: Dependencies and impacts on the environment can result in changes to the capacity of nature to provide social and economic functions. Additionally, it is essential for financial institutions to identify, assess, and manage dependencies and impacts on the environment in order to assess effectively the risks and opportunities related to their various portfolio activities. This question allows data users to gauge the organization's awareness of its own environmental dependencies and impacts.

columns.text: Process in place covering this portfolio
options: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to within the next two years
optionsKo: 아니요, 하지만 향후 2년 이내에 진행할 계획입니다
아니요, 향후 2년 이내에 진행할 계획이 없습니다

columns.text: Dependencies and/or impacts related to this portfolio evaluated in this process
columns.textKo: 의존성 및/또는 영향s 관련된 이 포트폴리오 평가된 이 프로세스

columns.text: Primary reason for not evaluating dependencies and/or impacts related to this portfolio
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 에 대한 아님 평가 의존성 및/또는 영향s 관련된 이 포트폴리오

columns.text: Explain why you do not evaluate dependencies and/or impacts related to this portfolio and describe any plans to evaluate this in the future
columns.textKo: 설명 왜 귀사 아님 평가 의존성 및/또는 영향s 관련된 이 포트폴리오 및 모든 계획 평가 이 미래

guidance.text: Rows in this question will be presented according to the activities reported in 1.10
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
Note that this question asks if you have a process to identify, access and manage 
dependencies and/or impacts related to your portfolio (lending, investing and insurance activities) . You will be asked about 
risks and opportunities in the following question.
Portfolio (column 0) 
The rows presented in this question depend on the activities you selected in question 1.10.
Process in place covering this portfolio (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if your organization has any process in place for identifying, assessing, and managing dependencies and/or impacts relating to the portfolio in column 0 "Portfolio". Select "Yes" regardless of whether both dependencies and impacts are assessed, and regardless of whether the process is integrated (i.e. across multiple environmental issues, and any other issues) or separated. You will have the opportunity to provide further details on your portfolio assessment process in 2.2.6.
Only select "No…" if you do not have any form of process for identifying, assessing, and managing dependencies and/or impacts related to the portfolio in column 0 "Portfolio". 
Explain why you do not evaluate dependencies and/or impacts related to this portfolio and describe any plans to do so in the future (column 4) 
This column only appears if you select any "No" option in column 1 "Process in place covering this portfolio" OR if you select any option except "Both dependencies and impacts" in column 2 "Dependencies and/or impacts evaluated in this process".
Describe the primary reason selected in column 3 "Primary reason for not evaluating dependencies and/or impacts related to this portfolio".
Describe any plans to evaluate environmental dependencies and/or impacts in the future, such as initial measures taken to put an evaluation process in place.
If you selected "Judged to be unimportant or not relevant" in column 3 "Primary reason for not evaluating dependencies and/or impacts related to this portfolio", explain the criteria used to decide that evaluating dependencies and/or impacts is not important or relevant to your organization.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: The financial institution has a robust process to identify, assess, and manage environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities across all of its portfolios.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표시된 셀 수에 비례하여 완료된 셀마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 문항에서 최대 3/3점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows displayed as follows:
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'Process in place covering this portfolio' - 1/1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, but we plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Process in place covering this portfolio' - 0.5/1 points
A maximum of 0.5/1 point is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed.
i) All of the following met - 0.5 points
‘Dependencies only' OR ‘Both dependencies and impacts' selected in column ‘Dependencies and/or impacts related to this portfolio evaluated in this process' AND
‘Dependencies' selected in any row in column ‘Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this portfolio' in question 2.2.6 AND
‘Climate change' selected in column ‘Environmental issue' in question 2.2.6
ii) All of the following met - 0.5 points
‘Impacts only' OR ‘Both dependencies and impacts' selected in column ‘Dependencies and/or impacts related to this portfolio evaluated in this process' AND
‘Impacts' selected in any row in column ‘Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this portfolio' in question 2.2.6 AND
‘Climate change' selected in column ‘Environmental issue' in question in 2.2.6
A maximum of 1/1 point available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

moduleTitleKo: 의존성, 영향, 리스크 및 기회의 식별, 평가 및 관리
issueTagsKo: 수자원, 생물다양성, 플라스틱, 기후 변경, 산림
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '귀사는 포트폴리오 활동과 관련된 환경 의존성 및 / 또는 영향을 식별, 평가 및 관리하는 프로세스를 갖추고 있습니까?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
listTitleEn: Does your organization have a process for identifying, assessing, and managing environmental dependencies and/or impacts related to your portfolio activities?
